ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "city_or_county" TEXT /* City or county where the incident occurred */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the incident */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Number of people killed in the incident */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Number of people injured in the incident */,
  "incident_url" TEXT /* URL to the official report or news article about the incident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the incident */,
  "month_year" TEXT /* Month and year of the incident */,
  "victims_count" INTEGER /* Total number of victims in the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., mass shooting, domestic violence) */,
  "weapon_type" TEXT /* Type of weapon used in the incident */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., homicide, assault) */,
  "suspect_count" INTEGER /* Number of suspects involved in the incident */,
  "suspect_names" TEXT /* Names of the suspects (if known) */,
  "police_response_time" TEXT /* Time taken by the police to respond to the incident */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "city_or_county" TEXT /* City or county where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Historical crime rate of the area */,
  "nearest_police_station" TEXT /* Nearest police station to the location */,
  "nearest_hospital" TEXT /* Nearest hospital to the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the victim was involved in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the victim */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Whether the victim was injured */,
  "killed" INTEGER /* Whether the victim was killed */,
  "relationship_to_incident" TEXT /* Relationship of the victim to the incident (e.g., bystander, target) */,
  "victim_type" TEXT /* Type of victim (e.g., adult, child) */,
  "victim_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "victim_education" TEXT /* Education level of the victim */,
  "victim_social_media" TEXT /* Social media profiles (if relevant) */,
  "victim_medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the victim */,
  "victim_family_status" TEXT /* Family status (e.g., single, married) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_victims_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report is related to */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., local police, news outlet) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Name of the author of the report */,
  "report_length" INTEGER /* Length of the report in words or pages */,
  "report_language" TEXT /* Language of the report */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "user_profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Bio or short description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES incident_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the analytics */,
  "month_year" TEXT /* Month and year of the analytics */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the analytics */,
  "total_incidents" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents in the period */,
  "total_killed" INTEGER /* Total number of people killed in the period */,
  "total_injured" INTEGER /* Total number of people injured in the period */,
  "total_victims" INTEGER /* Total number of victims in the period */,
  "total_incidents_by_location_type" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents by location type */,
  "total_incidents_by_incident_type" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents by incident type */,
  "total_incidents_by_weapon_type" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents by weapon type */,
  "total_incidents_by_crime_type" INTEGER /* Total number of incidents by crime type */,
  "average_response_time" TEXT /* Average police response time for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_analytics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES incidents ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_analytics_month_year FOREIGN KEY ("month_year") REFERENCES incidents ("month_year")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the intervention is implemented */,
  "impact_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the impact of the intervention */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the intervention (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "intervention_cost" REAL /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "intervention_funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the intervention */,
  "intervention_effectiveness_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the effectiveness of the intervention */,
  "intervention_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the intervention */,
  "intervention_evaluation_report" TEXT /* URL to the evaluation report of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
